name: agitrack-vscode
description: Start aGiTrack with the aG button (top-right of the editor) or "aGiTrack: Start aGiTrack" in the Command Palette — a coding agent (Claude Code / OpenCode) that auto-commits every turn with full provenance, run inside VSCode with no terminal typing required.

agitrack.path.description: Path to the agitrack executable (on PATH by default).

agitrack.backend.description: Backend to drive. Empty uses aGiTrack's configured default.

agitrack.args.markdownDescription: Any extra command-line arguments to pass to `agitrack` on launch, one per array entry (e.g. `["--no-worktree", "--delay-merge"]`). Anything aGiTrack doesn't recognize is forwarded to the backend CLI (claude/opencode), so this is the place to pass backend flags too — e.g. `["--", "--verbose"]`. These are appended after `agitrack.backend`.

agitrack.openOnStartup.description: Automatically start an aGiTrack session when a workspace opens.

enumDescriptions: In the editor area, split to the right of the current editor
In the editor area, as a new editor tab
In the bottom panel (VSCode's default terminal location)

agitrack.confirmTerminalClose.description: Prompt before closing the aGiTrack terminal so aGiTrack can exit gracefully (finalizing the latest turn). If VSCode's `terminal.integrated.confirmOnKill` is set to `never`, aGiTrack restores it to `always` so the close is confirmed.

agitrack.suppressTerminalEnvActivation.markdownDescription: Disable VSCode's automatic Python environment (venv/conda) activation in the aGiTrack terminal. The Python extension activates the env by sending `Ctrl-C` then `source .../activate`, which **interrupts and kills aGiTrack** at launch. The agent runs with its own interpreter and never needs the shell's venv, so this is safe. Implemented by turning off `python.terminal.activateEnvironment` only for the brief launch window, then restoring it. Turn off if you rely on venv activation in the aGiTrack terminal.

scripts.test: tsc -p ./ && node --test out/platform.test.js out/installPaths.test.js out/liveness.test.js out/github.test.js out/msi.test.js
